art_market.summary: Seoul's 2026 art scene continues its 'golden year' with diverse institutional programming and high-profile exhibitions.
key_events: Spectrosynthesis Seoul at Art Sonje Center: Examining LGBTQ+ practices in Seoul's cultural context (opened March 2026).
Damien Hirst Retrospective at MMCA Seoul: Major career survey focusing on themes of life, death, and human desire.
Kim Yun-shin Retrospective at Hoam Museum: 70-year career retrospective running through June 28th.
March Avery: Form into Color at Esther Schipper (March 3 - April 25, 2026).
art_market.outlook: Ongoing momentum with major museum openings slated for later in 2026, including Pompidou Center Hanwha Seoul.

stock_market.summary: Weekend update. KOSPI closed Friday, March 20 at 5,781.2 (+0.31%). The market remains volatile following significant fluctuations earlier in the month due to geopolitical risks.

key_indicators.Market_Sentiment: Cautiously optimistic but wary; high volatility (VKOSPI elevated).
key_indicators.Key_Drivers: Geopolitical risks vs. semiconductor cycle; retail buying vs. foreign net-selling.
key_indicators.Outlook: Monitoring stability amid US Fed hawkishness and energy-reliant economic sensitivity.
